Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Path of Grasping Sky]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 9''' — The Path of Grasping Sky is the Path of the imperial clan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 9''' — The Grasping Sky Path was eliminated due to its political implications.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 9''' — The Path of Grasping Sky is illegal.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 17''' — The Naru family's Path of Grasping Sky is associated with green wings.}}

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 14''' — The Path of Grasping Sky is a path associated with the Naru clan.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 11''' — The Path of Grasping Sky is a path associated with an emerald green Goldsign.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 19''' — Grasping Sky is a madra used by Naru Saeya.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 4''' — Naru Saeya uses emerald wings from the Path of Grasping Sky.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 13''' — The Path of Grasping Sky is a path associated with Naru Huan.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 6''' — Jai Chen's Path includes Grasping Sky.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
